description:
You are a Forest and Conservation Technician preparing a GPS data package for a field traverse along the GR7 trail from Dole to Langres, France. Import the track data from 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\dole_langres_track.gpx' and create a route named 'GR7 DOLE-LANGRES 5 JOURS' in My Collection using the following waypoints in the order listed. Export the complete collection, including the imported track and the new route, as a GPX file to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\GR7_Guide_DoleLangres.gpx.

Waypoints:
- Name: DEPART DOLE GARE | Lat: 47.0930 Lon: 5.4962 | Symbol: Car | Comment: Day 1 Start. Gare SNCF Dole. Group meeting 08:30. Parking: Rue de Besancon.
- Name: REPAS LABERGEMENT | Lat: 47.1640 Lon: 5.5100 | Symbol: Food/Water | Comment: Lunch stop Day 1. Labergement-Foigney. Water fountain at church. Km 13.5.
- Name: NUIT 1 PESMES | Lat: 47.2770 Lon: 5.5620 | Symbol: Building | Comment: Night 1. Gite Les Chevaliers. Tel: +33 3 84 31 23 91. Reservation required. 28km.
- Name: NUIT 2 GRAY | Lat: 47.4490 Lon: 5.5970 | Symbol: Building | Comment: Night 2. Hotel du Commerce Gray. Tel: +33 3 84 65 11 88. Supermarche nearby. 52km.
- Name: RAVITAILLEMENT CHAMPLITTE | Lat: 47.6183 Lon: 5.5133 | Symbol: Food/Water | Comment: Resupply Champlitte. Boulangerie, Pharmacie, Superette. Open Tue-Sat 08:00-12:30.
- Name: NUIT 3 JUSSEY | Lat: 47.8247 Lon: 5.9046 | Symbol: Building | Comment: Night 3. Camping Municipal Jussey. Tel: +33 3 84 92 11 63. Showers available. 80km.
- Name: ARRIVEE LANGRES | Lat: 47.8620 Lon: 5.3344 | Symbol: Flag, Blue | Comment: Journey end. Langres ramparts (UNESCO). Train back to Dole departs 17:42. 124km total.
